abusefilter-edit-builder-vars-user-mobil: Haddii isticmaaluhu wax ka beddelayo isagoo adeegsanaya is dhexgalka moobilka ($1)
mobile-frontend-copyright: Waxyaabaha waa lagu heli karaa hoos shatiga $1 ilaa si kale loo sheego.
mobile-frontend-desc: Waxay ka caawisaa hagaajinta joogitaanka moobilka ee MediaWiki
mobile-frontend-editor-anonwarning: Digniin: Ma soo gelin. Cinwaankaaga IP-ga ayaa si guud loo arki doonaa haddii aad wax ka beddel sameyso. Haddii aad soo gasho ama sameysato akoon, wax-ka-beddelkaaga waxaa lagu xiriirin doonaa magacaaga isticmaalaha, iyo faa’iidooyin kale.
mobile-frontend-editor-autocreatewarning: Digniin: Ma soo gelin. Marka aad wax ka beddel sameyso, akoon ku-meel-gaar ah ayaa laguu sameyn doonaa. [[$1|Baro wax badan]]. Soo gal ama samee akoon si aad u sii hesho ogeysiisyada ka dib marka akoonkan uu dhammaado, iyo si aad u isticmaasho adeegyo kale.
mobile-frontend-editor-blocked-drawer-ti: Ciwaankaaga IP-ga ayaa laga xannibay tafatirka {{SITENAME}}.
Ciwaankaaga IP-ga ayaa laga xannibay tafatirka boggan.
mobile-frontend-editor-blocked-drawer-bo: Isku day inaad wax ka beddesho bog kale.
Isku day inaad soo gasho haddii aad leedahay akoon.
Isku day inaad soo gasho haddii aad leedahay akoon, ama isku day inaad wax ka beddesho bog kale.
Isku day inaad soo gasho ama aad samaysato akoon.
Isku day inaad soo gasho ama aad samaysato akoon, ama isku day inaad wax ka beddesho bog kale.
mobile-frontend-editor-cancel-confirm: Ma runtii ayaad rabtaa inaad ka tagto tafatirkaaga?
mobile-frontend-editor-captcha-try-again: Koodh khaldan, fadlan isku day mar kale.
mobile-frontend-editor-disabled: Bogan waa la ilaaliyay si looga hortago burburin. [$1 Eeg isha]
mobile-frontend-editor-disabled-anon: Waa inaad soo gashaa si aad u wax uga beddesho boggan.
mobile-frontend-editor-error-conflict: Qalad, isticmaale kale ayaa wax ka beddelay boggan.
mobile-frontend-editor-error-loading: Qalad, lama soo shubi karo tifaftiraha.
mobile-frontend-editor-error-preview: Qalad, wax aan la filayn ayaa dhacay markii la soo shubayay hor u eegista. Fadlan xir oo isku day mar kale.
mobile-frontend-editor-licensing: Markaad daabacayso isbeddellada, waxaad oggolaanaysaa in ka qaybqaadashadaada lagu sii daayo hoos $1 {{PLURAL:$2|shatiga|shatiyada}}.
mobile-frontend-editor-licensing-with-te: Markaad daabacdo isbeddellada, waxaad ogolaanaysaa $1 waxaadna ogolaanaysaa in tabarrucaaddaada lagu sii daayo hoos yimaada $2 {{PLURAL:$3|ruqsad|ruqsado}}.
mobile-frontend-editor-new-page-confirm: {{GENDER:$1|Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad abuurto}} bog cusub oo ku jira {{SITENAME}}?
mobile-frontend-editor-placeholder: Qaybtani waa madhan. Adiga noqo qofka ugu horreeya ee ballaadhiya!
mobile-frontend-editor-placeholder-new-p: {{GENDER:$1|Waxaad abuuraysaa}} bog cusub oo ku jira {{SITENAME}}!
mobile-frontend-editor-summary-placehold: Tusaale: Khalad higaad la saxo, nuxur lagu daray
mobile-frontend-editor-uploadenable: Fadlan marka hore soo geli sawir si loo awoodo wax ka beddelka.
mobile-frontend-editor-toload: Tafatiraha ayaa hadda soo shubanaya. Haddii aad weli aragto fariintan dhowr ilbiriqsi ka dib, fadlan [$1 dib u cusboonaysii bogga].
mf-expand-sections-description: Had iyo jeer si caadi ah u ballaadhi qaybaha bogagga nuxurka.
mf-font-size-description: Hagaaji qoraalka si uu si fiican loo akhriyi karo
mobile-frontend-generic-login-new:
{{SITENAME}} waxaa sameeya dad adiga oo kale ah.
Soo gal si aad wax ugu darto.
mobile-frontend-languages-structured-ove: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii luqadaha boggan la soo rarayay.
Luuqadda aad raadinayso lama heli karo.
mobile-frontend-last-modified-date: Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay wax ka beddelay $1, saacadda $2
mobile-frontend-last-modified-with-user-: [$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 maalin|$3 maalmood}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 saac|$3 saacadood}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$3 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}}] hadda waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$4|[$5 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 daqiiqo|$3 daqiiqadood}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 bil|$3 bilood}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 ilbiriqsi|$3 ilbiriqsiyo}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
[$4 {{GENDER:$1|Tafatirkii ugu dambeeyay}} {{PLURAL:$3|$3 sano|$3 sanadood}} kahor] waxaa sameeyay {{PLURAL:$5|[$6 $2]|0=isticmaale aan la aqoon}}
mobile-frontend-media-load-fail-message: Khalad ayaa dhacay intii sawirkan la soo rarayay.
mobile-frontend-references-citation-erro: Khalad ayaa dhacay mana suurtagelin in tixraacan la soo raro.
mobile-frontend-requires-mobile: Boggaan lagama heli karo shaashada. Fadlan guji linkiga muuqaalka moobiilka ee qaybta hoose ee bogga.
mobile-frontend-save-error: Khalad ayaa ka dhacay kaydinta dejimaha. Fadlan hubi inaad oggolaatay cookies.
mobile-frontend-watchlist-a-z-empty-howt: Hadda ma aad la socoto wax bogag ah. Liiskaaga la socodka wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad la socoto bogagga aad xiisaynayso. La soco bogag adigoo gujinaya astaanta xiddiga.
mobile-frontend-watchlist-feed-empty: Ma jiraan bogag leh isbeddello dhowaan la sameeyay.
mobile-frontend-watchlist-purpose:
Liiska la socodka wuxuu kaa caawiyaa inaad calaamadeysato bogag oo aad la socoto isbeddellada ku dhaca.
Soo gal si aad u aragto.
mobile-frontend-watchlist-signup-action:
Liiska la socodku wuxuu kaa caawiyaa inaad calaamadeysato bogag oo aad la socoto isbeddellada ku dhaca.
Is diiwaangeli si aad u bilowdo hadda.
mobile-frontend-user-page-no-page-yet: Ma jiro bog isticmaale oo loogu talagalay $1
mobile-frontend-user-page-describe-yours: Waxaad ku sharrixi kartaa naftaada $1 kale ee isticmaala boggaaga isticmaalaha.
mobile-frontend-user-page-desired-action: Boggan waa in uu abuuraa oo wax ka beddelaa $1
tag-mobile_edit-description: Wax ka beddel lagu sameeyay moobil (mareeg ama app)
tag-advanced_mobile_edit: Wax ka beddelka moobil oo horumarsan
tag-advanced_mobile_edit-description: Wax ka beddel uu sameeyay isticmaale leh habka horumarsan
tag-mobile_web_edit-description: Wax ka beddel lagu sameeyay mareegta moobilka
mw-mf-amc-description: Habka horumarsan wuxuu fududeeyaa helitaanka bogagga doodda, bogagga taariikhda, qalabka isticmaalaha, iyo qalab kale oo tafatir ah.
mobile-frontend-user-pref-description: Beddel doorbidyadaada, oo ay ku jiraan erayga sirta ah, muuqaalka bogga, dejimaha ogeysiisyada, iyo kuwo kale.
mobile-frontend-console-recruit: Baro wax badan oo ku saabsan sida aan u dhisno boggayaga mobilka @ https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:MobileFrontend
mobile-frontend-special-pages-pref: Hagaaji oo fududee bogagga gaarka ah marka la isticmaalayo mobilka (lagu talinayo)
